The '''Trandoshan Scale of Honor''' was an award "given to those who go above and beyond in their assistance of a Trandoshan clan."

==Behind the scenes==
This is a reward from the online game ''Star Wars Galaxies'' for players who complete the [[Zssik Clan/Legends|Zssik Clan]] series of quests.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
